PreToolUse.command: python -c "import sys, json; data=json.load(sys.stdin); ti=data.get('toolInput',{}); fps=[ti.get('filePath','')] + [r.get('filePath','') for r in ti.get('replacements',[])] ; frozen=['frozen_contract.py','kernel_optimized.py']; sys.exit(2) if any(any(fp.endswith(f) and 'src/umcp/' in fp for f in frozen) for fp in fps) else sys.exit(0)"
